items.title: Smart glasses without a camera? Even Realities bets productivity beats recording everyone
items.summary: The glasses are targeted at people who might be constantly in meetings, giving presentations, and traveling to countries where different languages are spoken.

items.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
items.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

items.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
items.summary: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
items.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

items.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
items.summary: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

items.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
items.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

items.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
items.summary: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

items.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
items.summary: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

items.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
items.summary: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

items.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits

items.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
items.summary: Amid signs of slowing engagement,  Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

items.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
items.summary: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.
